content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.auth_manager
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/auth_manager.py (81 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Authentication Manager.

Manages secure storage and interactive retrieval of credentials for external integrations.
Uses the system keyring service for security.

CLASSES:
- AuthManager
  Methods: def get_credential(self, provider_name: str, key_name: str='api_key') -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def store_credential(self, provider_name: str, key_name: str, value: str)
  Methods: def request_setup(self, provider_name: str, required_keys: list[str]) -> Dict[str, str]
